topic: Aikido Security vs Veracode 2026: Startup AppSec vs Enterprise SAST Compared

key_points: Aikido starts at $350/month for 10 users vs Veracode's $15,000+/year entry
Both offer SAST, DAST, and SCA but with very different architecture approaches
Veracode better for Fortune 500 and government; Aikido better for startups and SMBs
Aikido reduces false positives by ~95% via reachability analysis
Deployment philosophy: cloud-native SaaS (Aikido) vs binary upload model (Veracode)
Aikido scan results in minutes; Veracode scans can take hours or days
Veracode supports 100+ languages including legacy COBOL, RPG, VB6
Aikido covers 16 scanner types unified under one dashboard
Aikido positions itself as the #1 Veracode alternative
Veracode requires binary compilation upload; Aikido connects via SCM API
Aikido auto-triggers scans on pull requests for shift-left security
Startup discount program: 30% off for companies under $1.5M funding and fewer than 10 employees
Veracode holds FedRAMP Moderate ATO — required for US federal/government contractors
9x Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for Application Security Testing
SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications
Supports binary analysis without needing source code access — unique for auditing third-party software
For SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance: Aikido is often sufficient for startups
Veracode's compliance dashboards are more mature for enterprise audit trails
Aikido CSPM + SAST + SCA combo covers most startup compliance needs
Veracode better for organizations needing NIST SP 800-53 compliance

stats.fact: Global application security market projected at $14.83 billion in 2026, growing at 18.8% CAGR through 2033
Aikido Security raised $60M Series B at $1B valuation in January 2026, led by DST Global
Aikido achieved 5x revenue growth and 3x customer growth in the year prior to its Series B
stats.source: Aikido Security Series B announcement, January 2026

stats.fact: Aikido is used by 100,000+ teams globally including Premier League, SoundCloud, Niantic, and Revolut
Veracode is a 9x Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for Application Security Testing
Aikido reduces false positives by up to 95% through AI reachability analysis
Veracode SAST entry pricing starts at ~$15,000/year for up to 100 applications; enterprise portfolios can cost $100K-$500K+/year
Aikido is the fastest-ever European cybersecurity company to reach unicorn status (in ~3 years since 2022 founding)
SAST software market alone projected at $1.27 billion in 2026
stats.source: Business Research Insights SAST Market Report 2026

stats.fact: Veracode supports 100+ programming languages including legacy enterprise languages like COBOL, RPG, and Visual Basic 6

angles: Speed vs. depth: Aikido's minutes-long PR scans vs Veracode's thorough but slow binary analysis
Cost disruption: $350/month all-in-one vs $15,000+/year for a single scan type
Startup journey to compliance: Why Aikido is often sufficient for SOC 2 without Veracode's overhead
The false positive problem: How Veracode's noise overwhelms developer teams without dedicated AppSec staff
Legacy code support: Veracode's irreplaceable value for COBOL, RPG, VB6 enterprise codebases
FedRAMP reality: Why government contractors cannot substitute Aikido for Veracode
Developer experience gap: Aikido built for developers vs Veracode built for security teams
Platform consolidation: Aikido's 16-scanner approach vs buying separate Veracode modules
Aikido unicorn status: What it means when a 3-year-old startup challenges a 20-year incumbent
